specific_mechanism: HEEG-EVAL: Heegaard-splitting decomposition for LLM behavior partition
llm_application: View LLM behavior space as a 3-manifold; decompose via two handlebodies (knowledge / reasoning) glued along a Heegaard surface (verification boundary); diagnose by genus of surface.
novelty_claim: Final round of E29. Distinct from prior eval-diagnostic R696 Yoneda + R702 Yoneda-natural.
